name: nl-gov-data-plugin
description: Claude Code plugin exposing Dutch government data intelligence skills via the nl-gov-data MCP — Tweede Kamer, Rijksoverheid, KOOP, BWB, Wetgevingskalender, Rechtspraak, and CBS data, plus issue-framing, parliamentary-positioning, policy-landscape, and tensions analysis. Intel tooling only: no document formatting and no client brand data.
